mapper.select:
SELECT s.SEEK_ID AS seekId, s.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, s.SEEK_TITLE AS seekTitle, s.SEEK_CATEGORY AS seekCategory, s.SKILLS, s.CONTENTS, TO_CHAR(s.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate, s.SEEK_URL AS seekUrl FROM JOB_SEEKER s JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON s.USER_ID = u.USER_ID
AND (s.SEEK_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.CONTENTS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.SKILLS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND s.SEEK_CATEGORY = #{category}
ORDER BY s.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT s.SEEK_ID AS seekId, s.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, s.SEEK_TITLE AS seekTitle, s.SEEK_CATEGORY AS seekCategory, s.SKILLS, s.CONTENTS, TO_CHAR(s.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDate, s.SEEK_URL AS seekUrl FROM JOB_SEEKER s JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON s.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE s.SEEK_ID = #{seekId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JOB_SEEKER ( SEEK_ID, USER_ID, SEEK_TITLE, SEEK_CATEGORY, SKILLS, CONTENTS, SEEK_URL, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( seq_job_seeker.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{seekTitle}, #{seekCategory}, #{skills, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contents, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seekUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE JOB_SEEKER SET SEEK_TITLE = #{seekTitle}, SEEK_CATEGORY = #{seekCategory}, SKILLS = #{skills, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTENTS = #{contents, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SEEK_URL = #{seekUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEEK_ID = #{seekId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT ( CONTACT_ID, SEEK_ID, USER_ID, SENDER_ID, CONTACT_CONTENT, COMPANY_INFO, JOB_INFO, CARD_IMG, REMARK, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_JOB_CONTACT.NEXTVAL, #{seekId}, #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{senderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{companyInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CONTACT_ID AS contactId, USER_ID AS receiverId, SEEK_ID AS seekId, SENDER_ID AS senderId, NULL AS contactTitle, CONTACT_CONTENT AS contactContent, COMPANY_INFO AS companyInfo, JOB_INFO AS jobInfo, NULL AS fileOrgName, NULL AS fileSavedName, CARD_IMG AS filePath, CASE WHEN READ_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS readYn, CREATE_DATE AS createdAt, READ_DATE AS readAt FROM JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CONTACT_ID DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND READ_DATE IS NULL

SELECT CONTACT_ID AS contactId, SEEK_ID AS seekId, USER_ID AS userId, SENDER_ID AS senderId, CONTACT_TITLE AS contactTitle, CONTACT_CONTENT AS contactContent, COMPANY_INFO AS companyInfo, JOB_INFO AS jobInfo, CARD_IMG AS cardImg, READ_YN AS readYn, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, READ_DATE AS readDate FROM JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT WHERE CONTACT_ID = #{contactId}
mapper.update: UPDATE JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT SET READ_YN = 'Y', READ_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE CONTACT_ID = #{contactId} AND READ_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT CONTACT_ID AS contactId, SEEK_ID AS seekId, USER_ID AS userId, SENDER_ID AS senderId, CONTACT_CONTENT AS contactContent, COMPANY_INFO AS companyInfo, JOB_INFO AS jobInfo, CARD_IMG AS cardImg, REMARK AS remark, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, READ_DATE AS readDate FROM JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT WHERE CONTACT_ID = #{contactId}
mapper.update: UPDATE JOB_SEEKER_CONTACT SET READ_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE CONTACT_ID = #{contactId} AND READ_DATE IS NULL
